title: acalypha fasciculata
intro: Acalypha fasciculata, also known as the cluster leaf or fan leaf, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain flavonoids, tannins, and alkaloids, and have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Acalypha fasciculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea and infusions, have been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
